item.title: Julio Ramirez Case: Mystery and Theft
item.description: A look at the mysterious death of Julio Ramirez and the theft that followed, with a focus on the known details and the questions the case raises. What happened next?

item.title: The Case of Dru Sjodin
item.description: A look at the case of Dru Sjodin and the questions it raised in a true crime investigation. This documentary-style story explores the known details and the search for answers. What stands out most

item.title: A Story of Trust and Caution
item.description: A reflective look at a real-life story centered on trust, caution, and the choices that can shape an outcome. Jackie Flores shares a thoughtful, documentary-style perspective on the case.

media:content.media:title: A Story of Trust and Caution
media:content.media:description: A reflective look at a real-life story centered on trust, caution, and the choices that can shape an outcome. Jackie Flores shares a thoughtful, documentary-style perspective on the case.

item.title: The Owner Wouldn't Let Them Inside
item.description: A true crime story centered on a tense refusal to let others inside, with case details and a documentary-style look at what happened next. A careful breakdown of the events and the investigation

item.title: A Story of Escape and Investigation
item.description: A documentary-style look at a real-life story centered on escape, investigation, and the questions that followed. Jackie Flores shares a thoughtful breakdown of the case and its key details.

item.title: Jealousy and a Tragic Case
item.description: A true crime story examining how jealousy played a role in a tragic case. This documentary-style breakdown focuses on the investigation and the events surrounding the case.

item.title: A Bowling Alley Disappearance Case
item.description: A look at the case of a woman who vanished inside a bowling alley, exploring the known details and the investigation behind the mystery. What happened that night?!
